yooessentials_access_conditions.label: Conditions
yooessentials_access_conditions.description: Set the conditions that will determine this element display or action execution, check each condition report for evaluation details.

yooessentials_access_mode.label: Evaluation Mode
yooessentials_access_mode.description: Set as AND to require all conditions to pass, OR for at least one condition, or write a custom evaluation logic.

yooessentials_access_mode_query.description: Set a custom evaluation query referencing each condition with brackets and it order number, e.g. {1}. Use AND|OR operators to form the evalution logic, e.g. {1} AND {2}. Add parenthesis () for altering the execution order, e.g. ({1} AND {2}) OR {3}.
